landing.heroDescription: Dala izithombe zemfundo ezinhle, izethulo, imisebenzi, amaphepha okusebenza nama-storyboards evidiyo ngomzuzwana. Vumela i-AI yenze umsebenzi onzima ukuze ugxile entweni ebaluleke kakhulu - abafundi bakho.
landing.featuresTitle: Konke Okudingayo Ukuze Udale Okuqukethwe Okumangalisayo
landing.demoSubtitle: Buka ukuthi othisha badala kanjani okuqukethwe kwemfundo okumangalisayo ngomzuzwana ongu-60 kuphela
landing.demoPlaySubtext: Bona ukuthi kulula kanjani ukudala izinto zesifundo
landing.sampleSubtitle: Izibonelo zangempela ezidaliwe othisha besebenzisa i-BrightBoard
landing.testimonialSubtitle: Hlanganyela nezinkulungwane zothisha abadala izifundo ezingcono nge-AI
landing.ctaSubtitle: Hlanganyela nothisha emhlabeni wonke abonga amahora njalo ngeviki ngokudala okuqukethwe okuqhutshwa yi-AI. Qala mahhala namhlanje - akudingeki ikhadi lesikweletu.
landing.faq1Answer: Chaza nje lokho ofuna ukukudala, bese i-AI yethu idala okuqukethwe kwemfundo okwazi ngomzuzwana. Ungadala izithombe, izethulo, amaphepha okusebenza, imidlalo exhumana nabantu, ama-storyboards evidiyo, nokuqukethwe kombhalo kunoma yisiphi isifundo nanoma yiliphi izinga lebanga.
landing.faq2Answer: Yebo! Izinga lethu lamahhala likunika ukudala okuqukethwe okungu-5 ngosuku. Lokhu kufanelekile ukuzama ipulatifomu nokudala izinto ezibalulekile zezifundo zakho.
landing.faq3Answer: I-BrightBoard isekela izinhlobo eziyi-6 zokuqukethwe: izithombe zemfundo, izethulo eziphelele namanothi omkhulumi, amaphepha okusebenza angaprintwa, imidlalo exhumana nabantu (njenge-Lucky Spinner ne-Memory Match), ama-storyboards evidiyo nokulandisa kwe-AI, nokuqukethwe kombhalo njengezindaba nezincazelo.
landing.faq4Answer: Ngempela! Konke okuqukethwe okudala kungokwakho ukusetshenziswa ekilasini lakho, ukwabelana nabafundi, ukuphrinta, noma ukufaka ezintweni zakho zokufundisa. Abasebenzisi be-Premium bathola okuqukethwe okungenayo uphawu lwamanzi.
landing.faq5Answer: I-BrightBoard isekela izilimi eziyi-11 okuhlanganisa isingisi, isiFulentshi, isiSpanishi, isiPutukezi, isi-Arabhu, isiHindi, isiSwahili, isiZulu, isiShayina saseMandarin, isiVietnam, nesiLuganda. Ungadala okuqukethwe usebenzise i-interface nganoma yiluphi lolu limi.
landing.faq6Answer: Imidlalo yethu njenge-Lucky Spinner, Memory Match, ne-Quiz Show ingadlalwa ngokugcwele ku-inthanethi. Dala umdlalo nje, bese uwudlala ngqo kusiphequluli sakho noma wabelane ngelinki nabafundi bakho ukuze bafunde bekude.

contentTypes.imageDesc: Dala imidwebo emihle, elungele ikilasi eyenza imiqondo iphile
contentTypes.presentationDesc: Dala amasethi amaslayidi aphelele anemifanekiso namanothi omkhulumi ngemizuzu
contentTypes.textDesc: Dala izindaba, izincazelo nezinsizakufunda ezilungiselwe nanoma yiliphi izinga lebanga
contentTypes.activityDesc: Klama imibuzo exhumana nabantu, imidlalo yokuhambisana nemisebenzi yekilasi ekhangayo
contentTypes.storyboardDesc: Hlela amavidiyo emfundo anokunyakaza ngeziqondiso zokubona ufreyimu ngofreyimu
contentTypes.worksheetDesc: Dala amaphepha okusebenza angaprintwa anemibuzo, ukugcwalisa izikhala nokunye

auth.loginSubtitle: Ngena ngemvume ukuze uqhubeke udala okuqukethwe okumangalisayo

home.chooseType: Khetha uhlobo lokuqukethwe bese uchaza okudingayo. I-AI izokukudalela ngomzuzwana.
home.subject: Isifundo
home.startCreating: Qala ngokukhetha uhlobo lokuqukethwe nokufaka incazelo ngaphezulu.

footer.description: Ipulatifomu yokudala okuqukethwe eqhutshwa yi-AI yothisha abamatasatasa. Dala izithombe zemfundo, izethulo, imisebenzi, amaphepha okusebenza nama-storyboards evidiyo ngomzuzwana.
